name: Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. Combine cream cheese and sugar, mixing on electric mixer until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Blend in vanilla.
6. Pour over crust.
7. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
8. Reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees F., then continue baking for 25 to 30 minutes or until set.
9. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan.
10. Chill. Top with pie filling just before serving.
